## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / feature

- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint, typecheck, security, audit, tests)
- [ ] New or changed tools have tests under `tests/unit/`
- [ ] New tools are registered via side-effect import in `app/main.py`
- [ ] Update tools are tagged `{"update"}` and delete tools are tagged `{"delete"}`
- [ ] README has been updated if a new tool was added
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data in the diff
